1:
Comrades, there is an instruction:
to welcome the New Year cheerfully.

Comrades, we have instructions to
welcome the New Year in a cheerful manner.

2:
- We won’t hire a Baba Yaga from outside,
we’ll cultivate one in our own collective!

- We won't hire Baba Yaga
from outside—
we'll train one in our own staff!

from outside—
we'll raise one in our own collective!

- We won't hire Baba Yaga
from outside— we'll bring her up in our own collective!

science does not know.
